scope_summary: Polish bundle for the existing auth surface: (1) forgot-email/password recovery flow, (2) refined biometric (FaceID/TouchID) unlock UI + post-sign-in activation prompt, (3) Google Sign In SDK + URL scheme activation (UI is already wired), (4) reserved follow-up: smart reminder management UI tracked separately.

ux_or_integration.compliance_decision: 5/5 PASS — all dimensions cleared with no new tokens needed; 88pt biometric icon takes documented DS-exception
ux_or_integration.heuristic_validation: 12/12 PASS + 1 N/A (Principle 1.9 Readiness-First N/A for auth surface, justified)

commits.title: Phase 3→4 transition + T0 extract auth shared components
A1 register fitme:// URL scheme + deep-link return handler
A2 — 60s cooldown + Supabase redirectTo on password reset
A4 + A5 — wire forgot-password recovery + 4 analytics events
B2 — biometric activation in AuthManager + AppSettings flag
B3 — wire biometric activation sheet + replace LockScreenView
B4 — 5 biometric analytics events + duration/reason instrumentation
D2 — eval test cases for password reset + biometric activation/unlock (15 cases passed)
D4 — naming-convention unit tests for auth analytics constants (5 cases passed)
D3 — UI tests + wire v2 forgot-password into EmailLoginView + 2 review fixtures

implementation.block_c_note: Audit at 2026-04-30T20:30Z confirmed C1-C4 wiring shipped in a prior PR before auth-polish-v2 began. Verification: Staging xcodebuild succeeded; produced .app Info.plist contains real OAuth client ID "881044848598-3lav013iveag86b27jckjpb7so6mf963.apps.googleusercontent.com" substituted from FITTRACKER_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID xcconfig var, and CFBundleURLTypes contains the reversed-client-id URL scheme. GoogleAuthProvider, GoogleRuntimeConfiguration, and AuthMethodSelectionView gating all already in place. Only remaining Block C work is out-of-code (xcconfig OAuth IDs in Debug+Release local files; Supabase dashboard Google provider toggle).
implementation.block_d_note: D1: 9 auth events + 5 screens + 2 conversions added to docs/product/analytics-taxonomy.csv. D2: 15 XCTest cases (FitTrackerTests/AuthPolishV2Tests.swift) all passing — covers SignInService password reset state, AppSettings.hasAskedForBiometricActivation, AuthManager activation predicate and simulator-path activation, attemptUnlock outcome, biometricTypeAnalytics mapping. D3: 5 XCUI tests (FitTrackerUITests/AuthPolishV2UITests.swift) — gap #1 fixed (real product gap; EmailLoginView "Forgot password?" was bypassing v2 screens, now opens .sheet hosting ForgotPasswordRequestView with NavigationStack push to ForgotPasswordCooldownView), gaps #4+#5 fixed via FITTRACKER_REVIEW_BIOMETRIC_OFFER and FITTRACKER_REVIEW_BIOMETRIC_LOCK env var fixtures, gaps #2+#3 documented as XCTSkip with follow-up paths (Supabase stub seam for cooldown view, .onOpenURL injector for SetNewPasswordView). D4: 5 XCTest cases (FitTrackerTests/AnalyticsEventNamingTests.swift) all passing — guards auth_ prefix compliance, GA4 snake_case + 40-char limit on the 9 new events, and conversion-event registration in AnalyticsConversion.events.

known_followups.title: ForgotPasswordCooldownView XCUI fixture
known_followups.note: Cooldown view requires successful Supabase requestPasswordReset to push from request → cooldown via NavigationStack. UI tests cannot stub Supabase. Resolve by adding env-var-gated DI seam that swaps in LocalEmailAuthProvider for FITTRACKER_REVIEW_FORCE_LOCAL_EMAIL=1, then drive request → assert cooldown.

known_followups.title: SetNewPasswordView XCUI fixture
known_followups.note: SetNewPasswordView is presented by .fullScreenCover bound to signIn.pendingPasswordResetURL — XCUITest cannot deliver fitme://reset-password URL into .onOpenURL. Resolve by adding FITTRACKER_REVIEW_PENDING_PASSWORD_RESET=1 env var that pre-populates pendingPasswordResetURL on launch.

timing.total_wall_time_note: Sum of research (8.6 min) + PRD active time (564 min net of v7.7 freeze pause).

prd.note: Drafted 2026-04-27 05:09→14:00 (~8.9h), paused for v7.7 freeze ~27h, resumed + approved 2026-04-28 17:00→17:30 (~0.5h). Net active ~9.4h.

tasks.note: Tasks enumeration and user approval. 17 tasks across 4 blocks; structure inherited from PRD Appendix C.

ux_or_integration.note: UX research + spec + build-prompt authored by /ux skill via subagent dispatch.

factors_applied.reason: Touches AuthManager, SignInService, BiometricService, GoogleSignIn integration, deep-link handler

complexity.computed_cu_note: Will be computed at session_end based on tasks count + factors

tasks.title: Extract AuthScaffold/AuthFormCard/AuthPrimaryButtonStyle/AuthBannerView/PasswordRulesSecureField/PasswordRulesTooltip from AuthHubView.swift to AuthSharedComponents.swift; fix 2 ColorAppColor typos (FR-18)
tasks.blocks_for: All A/B/C tasks (5 new screens depend on shared auth components)

tasks.title: Add fitme://reset-password URL scheme + Info.plist + AppDelegate routing
Implement SignInService.requestPasswordReset(email:) with 60s cooldown + Supabase redirectTo
tasks.files_correction_note: PRD listed FitTracker/Services/SignInService.swift + AuthManager.swift; actuals are FitTracker/Services/Auth/SignInService.swift + Auth/EmailAuthProvider.swift. AuthManager.swift not touched (cooldown lives at SignInService layer).

tasks.title: Build ForgotPasswordRequestView + ForgotPasswordCooldownView + SetNewPasswordView (3 SwiftUI screens)
tasks.implementation_note: Also extended EmailAuthProviding protocol with updatePassword(newPassword:) and added SignInService.setNewPassword(_:) so SetNewPasswordView has a working call path. Three impls updated (Supabase EmailAuthProvider via supabase.auth.update(user: UserAttributes(password:)), LocalEmailAuthProvider DEBUG mock, UnavailableEmailAuthProvider release fallback).

tasks.title: Wire deep-link return path in RootView → push SetNewPasswordView
tasks.files_correction_note: PRD listed FitTracker/Views/Root/RootView.swift; cover lives at FitTracker/FitTrackerApp.swift entry instead so it works from any auth state (onboarding, lock, app). Also extended EmailAuthProviding with processRecoveryURL(_:) so handleIncomingURL exchanges the URL for a Supabase recovery session before SetNewPasswordView's update call has session context. Bundled with A5 in commit 382a68f.
tasks.implementation_note: EmailAuthProvider.processRecoveryURL calls supabase.auth.session(from: url). LocalEmailAuthProvider DEBUG no-op; UnavailableEmailAuthProvider release 503. SignInService.handleIncomingURL is now async; wrapped at call site via Task { await ... } in FitTrackerApp.onOpenURL.

tasks.title: Analytics: fire 4 forgot-password events (requested/completed/resend/resend_blocked)
tasks.files_correction_note: PRD listed FitTracker/Services/AnalyticsService.swift; actuals are FitTracker/Services/Analytics/AnalyticsService.swift + AnalyticsProvider.swift (event/param/screen constants live there). Bundled with A4 in commit 382a68f.
tasks.implementation_note: 4 events + 4 params + 3 screens added; auth_password_reset_completed marked as conversion. SignInService gains passwordResetRequestedAt + passwordResetAttemptCount published state. Resend button now tappable during cooldown (visually dimmed) so _resend_blocked can fire as a real friction signal — was a contradiction in A3 (button disabled but PRD §Flow B wanted the event).

tasks.title: BiometricActivationSheet SwiftUI component (immediate-after-first-sign-in trigger per OQ-1)
tasks.implementation_note: Pure View, owns isLoading + errorMessage state. Two callbacks (onEnable async->Bool, onDecline). Layout per ux-spec §5.4 default state. All 7 a11y labels (#29-35) per ux-spec §6.1. presentationDetents([.medium]) + presentationDragIndicator(.visible) + presentationCornerRadius(AppRadius.authSheet). biometricLabel composed by stripping "Use " prefix from AuthManager.biometricLabel.

tasks.title: BiometricService extension: isFirstSignIn, requestActivationFromUser, activate(biometricType:) + Keychain integration
tasks.files_correction_note: Spec listed BiometricService.swift + KeychainService.swift. Reality: no BiometricService.swift — AuthManager.swift IS the biometric service (BiometricQuickUnlockProviding protocol; LAContext wrapping; biometricLabel/Name/Icon/Type already there). Skipped Keychain integration — Supabase already owns session storage; activation surface is purely flag-based with no secret to store.
tasks.implementation_note: AppSettings: hasAskedForBiometricActivation Bool persisted to UserDefaults under "ft.hasAskedForBiometricActivation"; never reset by sign-out per FR-11. AuthManager: shouldOfferActivation(settings:) FR-9 trigger predicate; requestActivation(settings:) async->Bool runs LAContext evaluatePolicy and flips both flags on success / only hasAsked on failure (FR-10).

tasks.title: Trigger sheet from OnboardingViewModel.onSignInSuccess + post-relaunch unlock flow in RootView
tasks.files_correction_note: Spec listed FitTracker/ViewModels/OnboardingViewModel.swift + FitTracker/Views/Root/RootView.swift. Reality: no OnboardingViewModel exists; trigger logic lives at FitTrackerApp.onChange(of: signIn.activeSession) which fires for any sign-in path (onboarding, AuthHubView, deep-link return). RootView.swift doesn't exist — rootView is a @ViewBuilder property on FitTrackerApp where the routing branches live.
tasks.implementation_note: Two pieces: (1) post-sign-in activation offer — @State showBiometricActivation in FitTrackerApp; .sheet wired with BiometricActivationSheet (B1) + AuthManager.requestActivation (B2). (2) post-relaunch unlock — new BiometricUnlockView per ux-spec §5.5 (full-screen authBackground, FitMeBrandIcon 72pt, "Welcome back, {firstName}" hero, 88pt biometric icon, AuthPrimaryButtonStyle CTA, optional "Use password" tertiary, error banner, auto-trigger auth on appear). rootView swap: BiometricUnlockView replaces inline LockScreenView. firstName derived from displayName whitespace split (UserSession has no firstName field).

tasks.title: Analytics: 5 biometric events (offered/activated/declined/unlock_completed/unlock_failed)
tasks.implementation_note: 5 events + 3 params + 2 screens + conversion entry. AuthManager.attemptUnlock() async->BiometricUnlockOutcome captures duration_ms + LAError-derived reason ("user_cancel"|"biometry_failed"|"system_cancel"|"passcode_not_set"|"other"). BiometricActivationSheet fires _offered on appear, _activated on enable success (with provider from signIn.activeSession.provider), _activation_declined on Not now / enable failure. BiometricUnlockView refactored to call attemptUnlock() instead of fire-and-forget authenticate(); fires _unlock_completed/_unlock_failed.

tasks.title: Add GoogleSignIn-iOS@8.x SPM dep + URL scheme + Info.plist update
tasks.preexisting_note: Verified at 2026-04-30T20:30Z. GoogleSignIn-iOS@8.0.0 SPM dep in pbxproj line 1909 (XCRemoteSwiftPackageReference). Info.plist URL scheme "GoogleSignIn" present (lines 22-27) bound to $(FITTRACKER_GOOGLE_REVERSED_CLIENT_ID); GoogleClientID + GoogleReversedClientID keys present (lines 52-55). Staging xcconfig at Config/Local/Staging.xcconfig has real OAuth IDs; Staging build successfully substitutes them into the produced .app Info.plist.

tasks.title: GoogleSignInService wrapper: signIn(presentingFrom:) + GIDClientID from GoogleService-Info.plist (per OQ-3)
tasks.preexisting_note: Verified at 2026-04-30T20:30Z. FitTracker/Services/Auth/GoogleAuthProvider.swift:39 wraps GIDSignIn.sharedInstance.signIn(withPresenting:) and exchanges the idToken via supabase.auth.signInWithIdToken(provider: .google). GIDClientID sourced from Info.plist via GoogleRuntimeConfiguration.clientID() per PRD OQ-3. SignInService selects GoogleAuthProvider when SupabaseRuntimeConfiguration.isConfigured && GoogleRuntimeConfiguration.isConfigured.

tasks.title: GoogleRuntimeConfiguration (remote-config flag for kill criterion 2)
tasks.preexisting_note: Verified at 2026-04-30T20:30Z. GoogleRuntimeConfiguration enum at FitTracker/Services/Auth/GoogleAuthProvider.swift:17-35 exposes clientID(in:) / reversedClientID(in:) (each rejecting empty strings + "YOUR_" placeholders) and isConfigured Bool. Acts as the kill-criterion-2 flag for the live UI path.

tasks.title: Wire Google rows in AuthHubView + flag-driven UI hide + fix ColorAppColor typos found in Phase 0
tasks.preexisting_note: Verified at 2026-04-30T20:30Z. AuthMethodSelectionView.swift:172 gates GoogleProviderRow on signIn.isGoogleAuthAvailable; line 217-218 shows "Google sign-in stays hidden until the Google SDK and URL scheme are fully activated." copy when unavailable. signIn.isGoogleAuthAvailable resolves to googleAuthAvailable which is true iff both Supabase + GoogleRuntimeConfiguration are configured (SignInService.swift:369).

tasks.title: Update analytics-taxonomy.csv with 9 new events (transcribe PRD Appendix A)
tasks.implementation_note: 9 events added to existing Auth category (auth_ prefix). 5 screens added to Auth scope. 2 conversion entries added (auth_password_reset_completed, auth_biometric_activated). Each event row tags its source task (A5/B4) in Notes for provenance.

tasks.title: Eval test cases: mock-Supabase forgot-password, mock-biometric activation/unlock, mock-Google sign-in
tasks.files_correction_note: Spec listed FitTrackerCoreTests/Auth/AuthPolishV2Tests.swift. Reality: no FitTrackerCoreTests/ target; tests live flat in FitTrackerTests/. File at FitTrackerTests/AuthPolishV2Tests.swift.
tasks.implementation_note: 15 XCTest cases. Inline stubs (StubAppleAuthProvider, StubEmailAuthProvider, ThrowingEmailAuthProvider) keep tests deterministic without real Supabase. xcodebuild test ** TEST SUCCEEDED **; all 15 cases pass.

tasks.title: UI snapshot tests for 5 new screens
tasks.files_correction_note: Spec listed FitTrackerUITests/Auth/AuthPolishV2UITests.swift. Reality: existing UI tests live flat in FitTrackerUITests/.
tasks.implementation_note: 5 XCUITest cases + real product gap fix + 2 env-var review fixtures. Real fix: EmailLoginView "Forgot password?" was bypassing v2 screens (called signIn.requestPasswordReset directly with no UI); now opens .sheet hosting ForgotPasswordRequestView with NavigationStack push to ForgotPasswordCooldownView via local @State. Fixtures: FITTRACKER_REVIEW_BIOMETRIC_OFFER=1 (mounts BiometricActivationSheet), FITTRACKER_REVIEW_BIOMETRIC_LOCK=1 (routes rootView into BiometricUnlockView). 3 of 5 tests drive real screens; 2 (cooldown + SetNewPassword) remain XCTSkip pending deeper test infra (see implementation.known_followups).

tasks.title: Update AnalyticsEvent enum + add unit tests for screen-prefix naming convention
tasks.files_correction_note: Spec listed FitTrackerCoreTests/Auth/AnalyticsEventNamingTests.swift. Reality: file at FitTrackerTests/AnalyticsEventNamingTests.swift. Spec also implied modifying AnalyticsService.swift to add events — events were already added in A5 (382a68f) + B4 (d477ef4); D4 is purely test coverage.
tasks.implementation_note: 5 XCTest cases enforcing CLAUDE.md Analytics Naming Convention + GA4 character/length rules. Coverage: all 9 auth-polish-v2 events carry auth_ prefix; events/params/screens snake_case + ≤40 chars; 2 conversion events registered. Custom isSnakeCase helper avoids NSRegularExpression. xcodebuild test ** TEST SUCCEEDED **; all 5 cases pass.

transitions.note: Phase 0 research approved. Open questions on activation timing, redirect URL scheme, and GIDClientID source defaulted to Claude's recommendations and surfaced explicitly in the PRD for confirmation.

snapshot.next_action_when_resumed: Continue PRD phase; cache_hits will populate automatically from v7.7 M1 writer-path instrumentation when this feature resumes work

snapshot.next_action_when_resumed: A2 — Implement SignInService.requestPasswordReset(email:) with 60s cooldown + Supabase redirectTo. PRD-locked OQ-2 says fitme://reset-password URL scheme. Touch only SignInService.swift; the URL scheme + onOpenURL handler already in place from A1.

paused_history.lifted_reason: User directed resume to start A2 work. Branch state already current (PRD/Tasks/UX approved; T0+A1 complete).

cu_v2.rationale: 3 sub-bundles (forgot-password / biometric / Google Sign-In) across 8 user flows. Auth = high-risk per CLAUDE.md (SignInService, AuthManager, Supabase). Mostly extends prior art. Auth flows need real-provider testing (Tier 2.1 area).
